items.title: Middle-class shoppers are pulling back, sending alarms through the retail industry: 'There are signs of real distress on the way'
items.description: Home Depot earnings fall short of forecasts as middle-class shoppers pull back, reflecting weaker consumer spending.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Tuesday Recap: Home Depot, Medtronic, Axalta
items.description: ↘️ Home Depot (HD): The big-box retailer cut its annual outlook as the home-improvement downturn continues. The stock closed down more than 6%, its biggest daily decline since 2023. Shares were up slightly after hours.

items.title: Why Home Depot (HD) Stock Is Down Today
items.description: Shares of home improvement retail giant Home Depot (NYSE:HD) fell 5% in the afternoon session after the company reported third-quarter results that failed to impress investors.

items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: Stocks Continue Losing Streak
items.description: Nvidia, which reports quarterly results Wednesday after the market close, fell 3%.  Home Depot fell 6% after reporting disappointing results.  A federal judge dismissed the Federal Trade Commission’s claims that Facebook-parent Meta Platforms has an illegal monopoly in social media.

items.title: These Stocks g the Most Today: Nvidia, Microsoft, Home Depot, Cloudflare, Energizer, Honeywell, Medtronic, Klarna, and More
items.description: Nvidia and Microsoft unveil a massive AI partnership with Anthropic, Home Depot reduces its full-year sales outlook, and Cloudflare reports widespread outages.
